title: Verify engagement content section logic
description: Test that the engagement section correctly shows acquired content if consumption is below 90% and switches to recommendations post-consumption.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
User has acquired content (e.g., added to watchlist).

steps.description: 1. Ensure consumption of acquired content is at 50%. Navigate to Trial Corner.
2. Observe the 'Engagement' section shows the partially watched content with a 'Resume' option.

expected_result: Initially, the section shows the acquired content. After consumption exceeds 90%, the section updates to show the top 1 recommended content in a similar genre.
